hooks.command: set +e; cd /d/꿀메이트 || exit 0; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"[git auto] uncommitted changes — run git commit + push manually"}'; exit 0; fi; unpushed=$(git rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$unpushed" -gt 0 ]; then if git push origin master >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"[git auto] pushed $unpushed commits to origin/master\"}"; else echo '{"systemMessage":"[git auto] push failed — check network/credentials"}'; fi; fi
